name: ntfy.sh
description: Send push notifications to your phone via ntfy.sh (free hosted or self-hosted). Supports title, priority (1-5), emoji tags, tap-action URLs, and attachments.

credentials_required.label: ntfy Topic Name
credentials_required.hint: Your private topic name (acts as a password — use a long random string, e.g. 'claw-alerts-ab3f9d21xy'). Install the ntfy app on your phone and subscribe to the same topic to receive notifications.

credentials_optional.label: ntfy Server URL
credentials_optional.hint: Default: https://ntfy.sh. Override for self-hosted ntfy instances (e.g. https://ntfy.my-domain.com).

credentials_optional.label: ntfy Access Token
credentials_optional.hint: Only needed for reserved topics or private self-hosted servers with auth enabled.

tools.name: send_notification
tools.description: Send a push notification (with optional title, priority, tags, tap URL, and attachment URL)

author: freddy-schuetz
